SiteSettings.title: Site Settings
SiteSettings.description: CMS configurations for Onka Solution website design, texts, and contact details

heroTitle.description: Main catching headline in Hero section

accentColor.description: Primary accent/point color hex code (default: vibrant purple #a855f7)

instagramLink.description: Instagram or social media profile link

PortfolioItem.title: Portfolio Item
PortfolioItem.description: A single design work display item in the creative gallery

title.description: Title of the client brand / project

description.description: Detailed description of the style, work process and solution

imageUrl.description: URL or design spec image description

BlogPost.title: Blog Post
BlogPost.description: Latest company news, brand notice, or industry design trend article

content.description: Rich content or body of the post

summary.description: Brief one-line summary of the post

ContactInquiry.title: Contact Inquiry
ContactInquiry.description: Messages submitted from the website's Contact Us form

serviceCategory.description: Requested service: 로고 디자인 | 광고/PR | 기타 문의

settings.description: Collection containing the single 'site_config' settings document

portfolio.description: Collection for branding and logo design portfolio showcase items

blog.description: Collection for company notices and copywriting/PR tips blogs

inquiries.description: Collection for user submitted contact and inquiry forms
